extracted_codes.display: Percutaneous test (scratch, prick, or puncture test)
extracted_codes.context: Percutaneous (scratch, prick, or puncture test): CPT 95004 95010

clinical_criteria: Any mention of 'peanut' in any section of EMR
Quantitative immunoassay testing performed (laboratory = RAST listed under Immunoassay)
algorithm_summary: The peanut allergy phenotype algorithm identifies patients from a searchable database with any mention of 'peanut' in their EMR. It then classifies them into two case types: Case Type 1 includes patients with quantitative immunoassay testing (RAST) or CPT code 86003 for allergen-specific IgE testing. Case Type 2 includes patients with various allergy testing procedures including percutaneous tests (CPT 95004, 95010), intracutaneous tests (CPT 95015, 95024, 95027, 95028), or food ingestion challenges (CPT 95075).
